title: Next to, behind and in front of

activities.feedback_correct: Next to significa al lado de.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La silla está al lado del escritorio.
El jardín está detrás de la casa.

activities.feedback_correct: In front of significa delante de.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El carro está delante de la casa.

activities.prompt: is / The / bank / next to / library / the
activities.correct_answer: The bank is next to the library.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa noun + is + next to + place.

activities.prompt: The school is behind of the park.
activities.correct_answer: The school is behind the park.

activities.prompt: The bus is in front of the hotel.
activities.feedback_correct: In front of indica posición delantera.

activities.prompt: next to, behind the house, in front of the store
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica cada grupo antes de unirlo.

activities.prompt: The cafe is next to the bank. The hotel is behind the bank.
activities.question: Where is the hotel?
activities.feedback_correct: El hotel está detrás del banco.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences using next to, behind and in front of.
Tell the AI where three places are relative to each other.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Describe cada lugar con respecto a otro.
